heading: Alaska land claimant liable for fees, commissions or purchase money; deposit in Treasury
label: 79d Alaska land claimant liable for fees, commissions or purchase money; deposit in Treasury
text: No provision of this Act shall relieve any public land claimant from the necessity of making payment of fees, commissions, or purchase money required by law or regulation in connection with an application, selection, location, or lease of public lands in Alaska, and all such payments, when made, shall be covered into the Treasury of the United States.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , which enacted sections 79d and 123a of this title and sections 366 and 367 of Title 48, Territories and Insular Possessions, amended sections 80 and 751b of this title, repealed sections 366 and 367 of Title 48, and enacted provisions formerly set out as notes under . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Oct. 9, 1942, ch. 58456 Stat. 778section 366 of Title 48
